How To Use It

Speed is the readable effect family. The value range applies the same display multipliers used by the game artifact tooltip, so it is easier to compare with in-game rolls.

Recycles Into

MaterialQty
Big Metal Scrap3-5
Metal Scrap3-10
Radiated Junk10-60

Related Artifact Variants

  • Superior Engine Booster
  • Exceptional Engine Booster
